expectations.text: Has a .remote.ts file using query() from '$app/server'

expectations.evidence: Uses a manual debounce() helper function called from handleInput, not $effect with setTimeout+cleanup

expectations.text: Has aria-live region for announcing results
Uses aria-busy attribute on loading state
Has a labeled search input (label element or aria-label)

expectations.evidence: Uses $state for multiple variables and $derived for activeDescendantId
